stemHtml: Your RBI is indicating a relative bearing of 270° to an NDB. Your magnetic heading is 176°. You have tuned in a VOR, which is co-located with the NDB. If your OBI is set to 056°, what will it indicate?

options.a: Full scale deflection to the left, TO indication.
options.b: Half scale deflection to the left, FROM indication.
options.c: Half scale deflection to the right, FROM indicattion.
options.d: Full scale deflection to the right, TO indication.
